name: Dill-Burnet Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the unsalted butter and Dijon mustard in a bowl.
2. Add the salad burnet sprigs and fresh dill.
3. Blend all ingredients thoroughly until the mixture is pale green.
4. The resulting butter will have a refreshing cucumber flavor, perfect for serving on grilled fish or fresh French bread with a salad.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
